nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Buru bush warbler
nodes.summary: The Buru bush warbler (Locustella disturbans) is a species of Old World warbler in the family Locustellidae. It is endemic to the island Buru in Indonesia where it is found on the forest floor. References International Ornithological Congress (July 25, 2020). "IOC World Bird List". Retrieved July 25, 2020.

nodes.name: Locustella
